description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 12 times.
Summons 5 homing arrow that tracks enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line based on their remaining HP and knocks them down. This skill applies an additional 800 Physical Defense Penetration, and against Bosses, deals additional Physical DMG.

After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK and Critical Hit Chance by [100->80] for [10 sec->7sec]. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to [3->6] times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows, each dealing 143% ATK Physical DMG.

dark.unified: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for [1 sec->0.5 sec].
Damage dealt to bosses increases by 5% per stack.

description.unified: [Moonlight Flash] Increases DMG by {0}%, and P.DMG the target takes by 20% for 10 sec.
[Moonlight Arrow] increases normal attack DMG by 50% [ (added) ] and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}% per stack.

dark.unified: Your Critical Rate is reduced by 300, but Critical DMG increases by [150%->70%].

description.unified: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by {0}% for 10 sec, and during the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical Damage to the target. The additional damage can only occur once every [ (added) 0.5 sec].
